channel.title: Agent-Builder on DSCE 2.0
channel.description: Recent content in Agent-Builder on DSCE 2.0

item.title: Transforming Retail with AI
item.description: A modern retail application built with a microservices architecture using RAG patterns.

item.title: Transforming Retail with Smart Agents
item.description: An edge-computing deployment pattern that leverages autonomous agents to track shelf inventory while updating processing nodes via localized streaming pipes.
